{{Quote|Attention, citizens! I am ''Grand Moff Nivers.'' This planet is now under control of ''the Empire!'' You will work for the Empire… or you will ''suffer!''<nowiki></nowiki>|[[Nigel Nivers]], to the citizens of Tandankin|<ref name="Special" />}}
'''Tandankin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Parallel to the [[Galactic War]], the unsolved murder of a popular [[Governor/Legends|governor]] made the ethnic factions of Tandankin accuse one another. The planet was considered to be at the brink of descending into chaos due to the dispute.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Investigation|Death of a Statesman}}</ref>

[[File:Tandankin.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The landscape of Tandankin]]
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Nigel Nivers|Nivers]] occupied the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], but Tandankin was [[Battle of Tandankin|liberated]] by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Wedge destroyed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] before they could even launch, by shooting down a [[Tandankin monument|tall tower]] that crushed the TIE fighters.<ref name="Special" />

The tower was the most cherished monument of Tandankin, and the populace was outraged, berating Wedge. Luke chastised them for their behavior, and they later apologized to Wedge and thanked him.<ref name="Special" />

Approximately ten [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], the planet was [[Invasion of Tandankin|invaded]] by the [[Stenax]] using stolen Imperial military technology, resulting in millions of [[Death/Legends|deaths]].<ref name="Gamer">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>
